title: $14k mistake: simple code beats fancy stacks
meta_description: Cut API latency 66% and AWS costs 63% by removing Redis, Kafka, and over-engineered patterns — the real cost of premature abstraction and how to avoid it.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $14k/year on over-engineered systems before measuring ROI.

Most of it goes to services nobody audits.

Here is what actually paid off 👇
